game_info.title: TUMBLE GUYS
game_info.concept:
Fall Guys is a free, cross-platform massively multiplayer party royale game. Clumsily compete in absurd obstacle courses with friends or build your very own chaotic course to share with the community. Steam URL: https://store.steampowered.com/app/1097150/Fall_Guys/ ================================================================================ Full Description: ================================================================================ Fall Guys is a free, cross-platform massively multiplayer party royale game. Clumsily compete in absurd obstacle courses with friends or build your very own chaotic course to share with the community.



You’re invited to dive and dodge your way to victory in the pantheon of clumsy. Rookie or pro? Solo or partied up? Fall Guys delivers ever-evolving, high-concentrated hilarity and fun. Prefer to be the maverick behind the mayhem? Build your very own obstacle course to share with friends or the wider community.

Create your own Course: Fall Guys Creative is a level editor that allows you to create fiendish custom Rounds and share them with the wider community.


Competitive & Cooperative: Tumble between competitive free-for-alls and cooperative challenges—or take on the Blunderdome with up to 3 friends!



Play with Friends: Fall Guys supports cross-play, cross-platform parties and cross-progression via your Epic Games Account.



Ever-Evolving Content: Play stays fresh with new collabs and game updates which bring new Costumes, Obstacles, and ways to play.



Gloriously Customizable: Choose from a multitude of Colors, Patterns, Costumes and Nameplates. Relish wins with extravagant Celebrations and share your flair with Emotes!

Items shown may require separate purchase from the in-game store and are subject to availability. Contains in-game purchases.
game_info.description:
Welcome to TUMBLE GUYS! A chaotic 3D obstacle course battle royale.

You are a colorful bean competing against a horde of AI bots to reach the finish line. Run, jump, and dive through treacherous spinning hammers, slippery slopes, and falling debris.

Navigate the course, avoid getting knocked off, and cross the finish line before the qualification spots fill up! If you fall, you will respawn at the last checkpoint.

Race to the top of the mountain and claim your crown!
game_info.controls:
- WASD / Arrow Keys: Move character
- Space: Jump
- Shift: Dive (gives a burst of speed but stumble recovery)
- Enter: Start Game
- Esc: Pause / Resume
- R: Restart Game (from Game Over screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Verify player initialization and gravity physics.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Start the game in TEST_1 mode. The player will be spawned in the air. We monitor the Y position for 60 frames.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player's Y position should decrease (gravity) until it hits the ground (y ~= 0-1) and stabilizes. Velocity Y should become 0.

TEST_1.expected: The player's Y position should decrease (gravity) until it hits the ground (y ~= 0-1) and stabilizes. Velocity Y should become 0.

TEST_2.strategy_description: Simulate a Space key press when the player is on the ground. Monitor Y velocity and position.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player's vertical velocity should become positive immediately. Y position should increase above the ground level.
TEST_2.strategy: Simulate a Space key press when the player is on the ground. Monitor Y velocity and position.
TEST_2.expected: Player's vertical velocity should become positive immediately. Y position should increase above the ground level.

TEST_3.test_description: Verify AI movement and bot generation.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Check the entity list for presence of bots. Monitor a bot's position over 100 frames.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: GameState should contain multiple enemies. Bot coordinates should change, indicating movement towards the finish line.
TEST_3.description: Verify AI movement and bot generation.
TEST_3.strategy: Check the entity list for presence of bots. Monitor a bot's position over 100 frames.
TEST_3.expected: GameState should contain multiple enemies. Bot coordinates should change, indicating movement towards the finish line.

TEST_4.test_description: Verify respawn mechanics (Fall out of bounds).
TEST_4.strategy_description: Teleport player to Y = -50 (below kill plane). Monitor position in subsequent frames.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Player position should reset to the last checkpoint coordinates (e.g., start line) and Y position should be positive.
TEST_4.description: Verify respawn mechanics (Fall out of bounds).

TEST_5.strategy_description: Teleport player to the finish line coordinates. Trigger collision with the finish sensor.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Game phase should change to "GAME_OVER_WIN". Score should be greater than 0.
